entities.name: CROP RESIDUE MULCHING
entities.description: The practice of applying crop residues to the soil surface to increase yields and improve soil properties

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum L.) used in the field trials

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop (Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench) used in the field trials

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop (Zea mays L.) used in the field trials

entities.name: SAHELIAN ZONE
entities.description: An agro-ecological zone in West Africa characterized by lower rainfall and weakly buffered soils

entities.name: SUDANIAN ZONE
entities.description: An agro-ecological zone in West Africa with higher rainfall than the Sahelian zone

entities.name: GUINEAN ZONE
entities.description: An agro-ecological zone in West Africa with the highest rainfall among the studied zones

entities.name: PH
entities.description: A measure of soil acidity or alkalinity

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation, which varies across the studied zones

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A chemical nutrient applied in the factorial experiments

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A chemical nutrient applied in the factorial experiments

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: A measure of cereal growth and biomass increase

entities.name: P AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The accessibility of phosphorus for plant uptake in the soil

entities.name: WIND EROSION
entities.description: The removal of soil by wind, which crop residues help protect against

entities.name: PEAK TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The maximum temperature of the topsoil

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available for plants in the soil

entities.name: SOIL CLAY CONTENT
entities.description: The proportion of clay particles in the soil

entities.name: AIR TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The temperature of the atmosphere

entities.name: DECOMPOSITION RATE
entities.description: The speed at which mulch material breaks down
